series_metadata.series_description: Including tapes, transcriptions, exhibits, and any documents filed including pleadings, motions, briefs, reports and recommendations, objections and the final order.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 2 Years after final disposition then review by State Archives prior to disposal. ; Paper: 2 Years after final disposition then review by State Archives prior to disposal., Electronic: Shred ; Paper: Shred
